headline: Another airline shuts down for summer, cancels all flights

headline: American Airlines Stock Falls After Snubbing United Merger
summary: American Airlines  stock fell 3% ahead of the open as investors took on board the carrier’s abrupt rejection of  United Airlines  ’ merger pitch.  Airlines and cruise operators have been among the most volatile stocks during the conflict—with surging jet fuel prices a big threat to earnings.  More than 1,200 Southwest Airlines flights were delayed Sunday, 29% of its schedule, according to flight-tracker FlightAware.

headline: Is Delta Air Lines (DAL) Still Attractive After An 84% One Year Share Price Jump
summary: How recent performance and news set up the valuation story Before getting into models and ratios, it helps to frame what actually matters for you as an investor in Delta Air Lines, starting with how the market has been pricing the stock and what might be driving that. Over the past year the share price has shown significant movement, with returns of 7.0% over the last week, 13.1% over the last month, 3.9% year to date and 83.9% over the last year, with 116.6% and 58.6% returns over the last 3...

headline: Another airline cancels flights for disturbing reason
summary: With jet fuel remaining at record highs amid the closure of the Strait of Hormuz, a number of airlines have started to cancel flights to run only the most profitable routes.
